data.summary_suggestion: Send a temporary push notification message
data.description_suggestion: Sends an ephemeral (temporary) push notification that is not stored on Pushbullet servers. Ephemeral messages are delivered immediately to active devices but are not persisted. Requires message content and target device or channel in the request body. Returns the sent ephemeral object. Useful for transient notifications that don't need to be archived.
data.reasoning: Original summary doesn't explain what 'ephemeral' means in this context. Description is missing entirely.
